name: apply_effects
description: Apply visual effects to an image including blur, sharpen, grayscale, sepia, contrast and brightness adjustments, and AI-powered background removal.

parameters.name: blur
parameters.description: Gaussian blur radius (0-2000). Higher values mean more blur.

parameters.name: monochrome
parameters.description: Apply a monochrome effect with this hex color tint.

body.note: Returns the image with effects applied: Gaussian blur of 50px, contrast boosted by 15, and brightness increased by 10.
